channel.title: Food on Hidden Japan Tokyo
channel.description: Recent content in Food on Hidden Japan Tokyo

item.title: Kominka Stays: How to Sleep in a Traditional Japanese Farmhouse
item.description: A practical guide to booking a whole traditional Japanese farmhouse — what kominka stays actually are, where to find genuine ones, and what to expect.

item.title: Rural Japan Food: 5 Local Food Experiences Worth Leaving Tokyo For
item.description: Five authentic rural Japanese food experiences you won't find in city restaurants — from Tohoku mountain cuisine to hand-pulled soba in a converted farmhouse.
